key_drivers: USD weakness is supporting metals and non-USD FX while cushioning risk assets.
Middle East supply disruptions are keeping crude supported even as U.S. inventories built.
Soft U.S. growth and a flatter curve are pressuring cyclical equity segments, especially the Dow and Russell 2000.
China PMI recovery, a hawkish RBA move, and firmer copper are creating a strong bullish setup for AUD.

stale_sources: World Gold Council ETF flow data published 2026-04-08
ECB, RBA, and BoJ policy assessments rely on the latest official March meeting communications
fallbacks_used: CBOE VIX page after CNBC VIX access was blocked
Barchart copper quote after Investing.com access was blocked
MacroMicro 10-year TIPS page after CNBC US10YTIP access was blocked
Reuters eurozone PMI coverage after S&P Global PMI page access was blocked
EIA CSV table1 extraction for inventory classification
